hero.headline: Your Family Pool, Always Ready
hero.subheadline: For over 11 years, Frisco families have trusted A&C Pools to keep their backyard oasis crystal clear. Our certified technicians handle everything so you can focus on making memories.
checkmarks: Proactive problem detection saves you money
Serving North Dallas with competitive pricing

services.headline: Complete Pool Care Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to equipment repairs, our certified techs keep your pool sparkling and safe all year long.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks every week so your pool is always swim-ready.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs & Installs
cards.description: Expert repair and installation of pumps, heaters, filters, and automation systems to keep everything running smoothly.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough filter maintenance that restores optimal water circulation and extends the life of your filtration system.

cards.title: Chemical Balancing
cards.description: Precise water chemistry testing and adjustment to maintain safe, healthy, and crystal-clear swimming conditions.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Complete inspections that catch small issues before they become expensive problems, saving you time and money.

cards.title: Tile & Deck Repairs
cards.description: Professional tile repair, mastic replacement, and coping sealant services to protect your pool's structure and beauty.

steps.title: Schedule Your Assessment
steps.description: Call or fill out our form for a free, no-obligation pool evaluation at your home.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: We inspect your pool and recommend a maintenance plan tailored to your equipment and budget.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Relax while our certified technicians keep your pool pristine week after week, year after year.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 2015
about.headline: Built on Relationships, Not Just Service Calls
about.description: A&C Pools was founded with a simple belief: pool service should feel personal. As a family-owned company in Frisco, we treat every customer like a neighbor. Our TICL-licensed technicians don't just clean pools — they proactively monitor your equipment and water chemistry to prevent costly surprises. That's why North Dallas families have trusted us for over a decade.

features.title: Certified & Licensed Technicians
features.description: Every tech holds a TICL license and is trained to spot problems before they become costly repairs.

features.title: Transparent Pricing, No Contracts
features.description: We earn your business every visit with honest, competitive pricing and zero hidden fees or long-term commitments.

features.title: Same-Tech Consistency
features.description: Your assigned technician knows your pool inside and out, ensuring nothing gets missed visit after visit.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. We'll assess yours and provide a clear quote with no hidden costs — just honest, competitive pricing for premium service.

guarantee.headline: Our Promise to You
guarantee.description: If you're ever unhappy with a service visit, we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. We've built our reputation on reliability and honesty — and we stand behind every visit with a satisfaction guarantee.

faqs.question: How often should my pool be serviced?
faqs.answer: We recommend weekly service to maintain proper chemical balance and prevent algae growth. In North Texas heat, consistent maintenance is essential to keep your pool safe and clear.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Frisco, Allen, McKinney, Prosper, Plano, Richardson, Dallas, and surrounding North DFW communities.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold Texas TICL License #831 and maintain an A+ rating with the BBB. Our techs are trained to identify and resolve issues proactively.

faqs.question: What does weekly maintenance include?
faqs.answer: Each visit includes skimming, brushing, vacuuming, chemical testing and balancing, filter basket cleaning, and a full equipment inspection to catch problems early.

faqs.question: Can you repair my pool equipment?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We service and install pumps, heaters, filters, lighting, automation systems, and more. If your equipment has an issue, we'll diagnose it and provide a clear repair estimate.

testimonials.name: JP P.
testimonials.text: They've elevated the pool maintenance business with consistency, reliability, professionalism and personal care. Each individual is friendly, knowledgeable, and their pricing is very competitive.

testimonials.name: Sean S.
testimonials.text: Very good about identifying possible issues before they become big problems. That proactive approach has saved us money multiple times.

testimonials.name: Terry M.
testimonials.text: Best pool guys I have had since owning my home. Reliable, honest, and they truly care about keeping our pool in perfect shape.
